improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating what Gideon offers and the free trial hook. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. The copy highlights key differentiators (Claude-powered, voice chat, trade focus) and the low-barrier entry point without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI Business Partner Is Ready"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — an intelligent trade and business assistant powered by Claude. Ask anything, speak naturally, and get professional answers instantly. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: The headline positions Gideon as a partner rather than a tool, building trust and implying ongoing value. The subheading clearly communicates what Gideon is (Claude-powered AI assistant), how it works (ask questions, voice chat), and the risk-free entry point (three free searches). This structure addresses visitor questions in order of importance: what is this, why should I care, and how do I start.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to join as a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, with flexible monthly or annual billing options—annual plans save you 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey: the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and savings opportunity, it reduces uncertainty and positions the paywall as a natural, affordable next step rather than a barrier.
